news.headline: Huawei is considering deploying Ascend AI chips in Latin America, cloud chief says
news.summary:
Huawei Technologies is studying whether to run its newest Ascend artificial intelligence chips inside its cloud and AI services in Latin America, a senior executive has confirmed, in a move that would push Chinese-designed hardware deeper into a region long courted by US suppliers.
Mark Chen, presid

news.headline: Meta's social networks down for thousands of users
news.summary:
<p>Facebook-parent Meta said on Friday that users were having trouble accessing the social media company’s services.</p>
<p>“We’re aware people are currently having trouble accessing our services. We’re working on it,” the company’s spokesperson Andy Stone said in a post on X.</
